title: BitNet-TT session 9: Plan v4 Phase 2 — self_attn sub-op alignment
phase_1_target: self_attn (RFE 0.240 from one op at L0)
goal: Drill into self_attn to identify the dominant sub-op (fused QKV+norm, RoPE, SDPA, o_proj), then align it with HF bf16 semantics. Acceptance: sub-op RFE drops below 0.05 without tps regression below 70 t/s.
constraints: Add BITNET_LOCALIZE sub-captures inside MultiHeadAttention.__call__ (post_qkv, post_rope, post_sdpa, post_attn_sub_norm).
Match HF BitNet self_attn internal boundaries (q_proj/k_proj/v_proj, apply_rotary_pos_emb, scaled_dot_product_attention, o_proj).
Kernel modification must not regress decode_tps below 70 t/s floor.
All measurements on TT server via ssh TT.

stories.title: Add sub-op capture points inside MultiHeadAttention
acceptanceCriteria: Instrument attention.py MultiHeadAttention.__call__ with _maybe_capture at post_qkv, post_rope, post_sdpa, post_o_proj.
Verify shape alignment with HF bf16 reference.

stories.title: Rerun RFE ranking with sub-op resolution
acceptanceCriteria: Rank sub-op RFE contributions within self_attn.

stories.title: Align top-1 sub-op kernel to HF bf16 semantics
acceptanceCriteria: Modify the dominant sub-op's compute_kernel_config / reduction order / accumulator to reduce RFE.
BITNET_PHASE2_* env flag gates the change (default OFF).

stories.title: Joint re-measurement + commit
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end bench_batch32 + bench_accuracy with the fix on.
Record (decode_tps, PCC vs HF fp32, PCC vs HF bf16).
